event_blocks.summary: A young woman in a white sweater takes a mirror selfie in a pink-walled room with a red leather chair, as a male voice announces in Russian, "So, we're going to the gym," and she declares, "Mood is bomb." She then walks outside with a backpack, adjusting her hair and remarking, "I just ate super deliciously," before laughing heartily while eating a meal with a friend in a cozy dining area. Transitioning to a kitchen, she playfully dances with a man in plaid pajamas, stating, "I made my favorite salad." Upbeat electronic music begins as she moves to a gym, performing squats with a barbell, deadlifts, and pull-ups, with on-screen text labeling 'тренировки' and 'режим.' During her workout, male voices comment, "Wake up to reality," and "Never goes as planned in this aggressive world." The electronic music continues as the focus shifts to nutrition, showing close-ups of her eating rice and vegetables, and a plate of pancakes topped with avocado and eggs, accompanied by the text 'ПИТАНИЕ.' She takes another mirror selfie in a teal-walled room, revealing a tattoo on her arm, and expresses, "I'm just shocked. I'm just shocked that I managed to do all this." The video concludes with her lying in bed, eyes closed, as a digital clock displays '09:00 AM,' the electronic music fades, and a digital alarm clock begins beeping.

Bedroom Lamp.description: A beige lamp with a classic shade placed on a bedside table, visible during the final scene of the woman lying in bed.

Friend at Dinner.description: A woman in a white top sitting across from the main subject during a meal, partially visible in the background.

Gym Instructor/Observer.description: A man in a blue t-shirt standing nearby while the woman performs pull-ups in the gym, possibly observing or coaching.

Man in Pajamas.description: A young man wearing a gray t-shirt and plaid pajama pants, seen dancing playfully with the woman in the kitchen.

Young Woman.description: A young woman with reddish-brown hair, seen in various outfits including a white sweater, orange top, white tank top, and black workout attire. She is consistently the central figure, engaging in activities like taking selfies, eating, dancing, and exercising. She has a visible tattoo on her left arm in later scenes. Her voice is heard speaking Russian, expressing her 'bomb mood,' satisfaction after eating, pride in making her favorite salad, and shock at her accomplishments.

event_blocks.summary: A young woman with reddish-brown hair, wearing a white floral tank top and a rose-and-arrow tattoo on her left arm, sits on a beige leather sectional sofa in a warmly lit living room, which features yellow walls, decorative stone columns, and Egyptian-themed wall art. She initially expresses disorientation and difficulty waking up, lamenting a messed-up sleep schedule and the heat outside, but declares, 'but we don't despair!' She then announces the start of a 'marathon,' discussing adjustments to nutrition, regimen, and workouts, admitting uncertainty about recovery and rest. Transitioning to her kitchen with light yellow cabinetry and a black backsplash, she explains her plan to have breakfast and take measurements, listing strict conditions: 'without sugar,' 'without any bullshit,' 'without overeating,' and 'without undereating.' Upbeat, rhythmic background music begins as she moves back towards the living area. Later, inside a refrigerator, she points to eggs and milk, stating they will boil one egg for porridge. In the kitchen, she boils an egg in a stainless steel pot on the gas stove, then prepares oatmeal by pouring two cups of water and one cup of milk into a large stainless steel pot, adding oatmeal and stirring, noting she usually makes it for two people and needs to adjust the quantity. She expresses hope that it cooks normally, remarking that the egg is 'going crazy.'

Egyptian-Themed Wall Art.description: A large framed artwork depicting ancient Egyptian figures and hieroglyphs, mounted above the Beige Leather Sectional Sofa in the living room.

Decorative Stone Columns.description: Tall, textured columns made of stacked stone, positioned near the arched doorways, contributing to the room's architectural style.

Yellow Wall Sconces.description: Bright yellow wall-mounted sconces placed symmetrically on the yellow walls, adding decorative lighting to the room.

Beige Leather Sectional Sofa.description: A large, plush sectional sofa in a light beige color, occupying a significant portion of the living room space.

Young Woman.description: A young woman with reddish-brown hair, wearing a white floral tank top, speaking directly to the camera in clear Russian with expressive hand gestures. She explains her egg storage, the purpose of the milk for porridge, and details her oatmeal cooking process, including adjusting the recipe for one person (mentioning 'Roma') and humorously commenting on the boiling egg. She has a visible tattoo of a rose with an arrow on her left arm and occasionally touches her forehead or adjusts her hair. She moves through the kitchen, maintaining eye contact with the camera while preparing food.

Boiling Pot.description: A dark-colored pot on a stovetop with water boiling and an egg being cooked inside, accompanied by distinct bubbling water sounds.

Knife Block.description: A wooden knife block with several knives, placed on the kitchen counter next to the stove.

Gas Stove.description: A white gas stove with multiple burners, branded 'ARISTON', situated in the kitchen with a black grate and control knobs.

Stainless Steel Pot.description: A large, shiny stainless steel pot on a gas stove, into which water is poured (with associated pouring sounds) and later oatmeal is added, containing a creamy mixture that is stirred with a spoon, producing stirring sounds.

Kitchen Counter.description: A dark gray countertop with various kitchen items, including a plate with a floral design, a dish rack, and a decorative green backsplash with vegetable patterns.

Teacup with Floral Design.description: A small white teacup with a delicate floral pattern, used by the Young Woman to pour liquid (water) into the stainless steel pot, accompanied by pouring sounds.

Refrigerator Interior.description: A white refrigerator with shelves holding various food items, including a clear container of eggs with a blue lid, stacked dairy products, and a bottle of milk labeled 'Молоко' in Russian.

raw_segments: The video opens with a close-up of a person lying in bed, partially covered by a patterned blanket, with a bedside lamp visible in the background. An alarm sounds, and on-screen Russian text, mirrored by a groggy voice, declares 'как же тяжело встать...' (how hard it is to get up...), setting a sleepy, early-morning tone. The scene quickly transitions to a young woman with reddish-brown hair, wearing a white floral tank top, sitting on a beige leather sectional sofa in a warmly lit living room. She speaks directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures, occasionally touching her forehead or adjusting her hair, revealing a rose with an arrow tattoo on her left arm. She explains that her partner, Romka, is not home, having gone to the dacha with an overnight stay, which made her 'very scared to fall asleep' alone in their 'huge apartment.' She recounts finally falling asleep around 1 AM after watching TikTok, and despite allowing herself to wake up at 9:30 AM, she still feels completely disoriented and finds it incredibly difficult to get up even at that hour, having completely messed up her sleep schedule. The camera angle widens slightly, revealing more of the living room with its yellow walls, arched doorways, decorative stone columns, and a large framed Egyptian-themed artwork above the couch. She further laments the 'heat outside,' mentioning she's already sweating, but concludes with a determined 'but we don't despair!'

The video opens with a Young Woman, her reddish-brown hair framing her face, sitting on a Beige Leather Sectional Sofa in a warmly lit living room. Wearing a white floral tank top and displaying a rose-and-arrow tattoo on her left arm, she speaks directly to the camera in Russian with expressive hand gestures, announcing the start of a 'marathon.' Her speech is briefly interrupted by a sudden, loud, distorted male voice shouting, 'TURN DOWN THE VOLUME!' She quickly resumes, discussing adjusting nutrition, regimen, and workouts for the marathon. As she continues, she expresses uncertainty about how she will manage, admitting she often doesn't have time to recover or rest. Moving through the space, she transitions from the living room, with its Egyptian-Themed Wall Art and glowing Yellow Wall Sconces on yellow walls, into an open-plan kitchen featuring light yellow cabinetry and a black backsplash, framed by Decorative Stone Columns. She maintains eye contact with the camera, occasionally touching her forehead or adjusting her hair, explaining she started the marathon now because her 'practice' has begun and she's at home in a 'free environment.' She plans to have breakfast and take measurements, expressing frustration with an expletive about the upcoming week, but ultimately declares her readiness. She then lists her strict conditions: 'without sugar,' 'without any bullshit,' 'without overeating,' and 'without undereating.' As she finishes speaking, upbeat, rhythmic background music with a strong bassline begins, accompanying her movement back towards the living area, where she briefly pauses near a dining table and a dark wooden cabinet. The warm lighting consistently highlights the cozy, spacious interior.

The segment opens with a close-up inside a refrigerator, where a hand points to a clear container of eggs with a blue lid, surrounded by stacked dairy products. Upbeat background music plays as a Young Woman's clear voice, speaking Russian, explains, "So, we're taking one egg to boil now." She continues, detailing their egg storage, noting there are "probably 20-30 eggs" as they buy "two trays of eggs at once." The hand then retrieves a bottle of milk labeled 'Молоко', and the Young Woman states, "And we take milk. It's for porridge." The scene transitions to a dark pot on a stovetop, where an egg is being boiled in bubbling water, accompanied by distinct bubbling sounds. The camera then focuses on the Young Woman, who stands in her kitchen with light yellow cabinets, speaking directly to the camera and gesturing. She announces, "And now I'll show you how I'm going to cook oatmeal." She describes taking a "small" white teacup with a floral design, then pours its contents into a large, shiny stainless steel pot on the gas stove, with pouring sounds audible. She explains, "We fill water from the tap, one cup. Pour into the pot," and then adds a second cup. She then realizes aloud, "Only now I realized that I usually make porridge with Roma and add water and milk for the two of us, but here I need to reduce it by one time." She clarifies, "I need two cups of water and one cup of milk." The stainless steel pot is then shown simmering with a creamy mixture, into which she pours oatmeal, followed by stirring sounds as she mixes it with a spoon. She concludes, "I hope everything cooks normally. And our egg is already going crazy," maintaining eye contact with the camera.

event_blocks.summary: In a kitchen with yellow walls and decorative stone columns, a Young Woman wearing a white floral tank top and a rose tattoo on her left arm stirs a creamy mixture in a Stainless Steel Pot on a Gas Stove, producing stirring and scraping sounds. She then pours the mixture onto a Plate with a Floral Design set on a Bamboo Placemat, accompanied by pouring and clanking sounds, before adding a spread from a small white container. Holding up a green 'MIX BAR Nature' packet labeled 'МИНДАЛЬ' (almonds), she states in Russian, "That's it, I've prepared the porridge, prepared honey for myself. Also prepared almonds for myself. I usually buy these from Mix Bar. This is the only thing I see in the store." She explains her breakfast plan: "So I'll add a little almond, make tea without sugar, and that's it, I'll start breakfast." The scene transitions to her eating, with chewing and slurping sounds, humorously exclaiming, "I'm going to shit myself!" She then expresses the difficulty of eating porridge, noting, "It's so hard to eat porridge. Now I still have an egg ahead, tea... It's so hard." She concludes by describing her eating habits: "Eat normally. I'm just used to not eating very much. I'm like, if I start to overeat..." The bright, natural daytime lighting remains constant.

Young Woman.description: A young woman with reddish-brown hair, wearing a white floral tank top, actively cooking and eating in her kitchen. She has a visible tattoo of a rose with an arrow on her left arm and is heard speaking in Russian, announcing her meal preparation (porridge, honey, almonds from Mix Bar), outlining her breakfast plan (adding almonds, making tea without sugar), and humorously expressing her struggle with eating a large meal ("I'm going to shit myself!", "It's so hard to eat porridge. Now I still have an egg ahead, tea... It's so hard."), before explaining her habit of not eating very much.

I usually buy these from Mix Bar. This is the only thing I see in the store." event_blocks.summary: The Young Woman begins by eating, expressing dissatisfaction with her meal but emphasizing breakfast's importance before a long fasting period. She then transitions to a pink-walled room, announcing a 'before-after' comparison for a fitness marathon, showcasing her physique in a sports bra and pajama pants, and measuring her body with a red measuring tape. She explains the marathon's delayed start, viewing it as a foundation for nutritional and routine adjustments, planning balanced meals, regular workouts, and incorporating running and stretching. The scene shifts to a yellow-walled room with a stone column, where she discusses her measurements, noting a 2 cm increase in her buttocks, expressing shock. Later, in a white sports bra and striped shorts, she discovers expired chicken, expresses relief at a grocery delivery, and unpacks items like chicken breast, tomatoes, cucumbers, broccoli, and beans in her kitchen. She prepares a dish by cracking eggs into a bowl with chicken, spreading diced tomatoes on a batter in a baking pan on the gas stove, and places it in the oven, layering chicken, tomatoes, and anticipating cheese for the third layer. After the casserole bakes, she and Romka discuss it, with Romka praising it as 'proper nutrition.' The scene shifts to her brushing her hair as Romka enters, and they discuss heading to the gym, acknowledging it's the first day of the marathon. She also hints at a future YouTube video about a room renovation. The setting then changes to an industrial-style gym where she performs cardio on an elliptical machine and then barbell rows with 30 kg weights, guided by a gym instructor. Her workout continues with leg presses, seated leg extensions, triceps pushdowns, and dumbbell presses, during which she notes her workout is 'a bit hard' and focused on legs without glutes, as it's Sunday and she trained glutes extensively the previous week.

Gas Stove.description: A white gas stove with black grates, visible in the kitchen as the Young Woman places a baking pan onto it, indicating the cooking process.

Wooden Staircase.description: A wooden staircase with visible steps and railings, shown in a shaky, descending shot at the end of the video, with the text '2 см' overlaid, accompanied by the sounds of footsteps and a final thud as the Young Woman descends.

Yellow-Walled Room with Stone Column.description: A room with a yellow wall and a decorative stone column, where the Young Woman speaks to the camera after the measurement segment, now shown in a kitchen setting with natural light and wooden furniture.

She speaks in Russian, describing her workout as 'a bit hard' and 'light' today, focusing on legs because she trained glutes extensively last week.

Kitchen Counter.description: A wooden kitchen counter where the Young Woman prepares ingredients, including cracking eggs into a bowl and handling grocery bags, with a knife block and other kitchen tools visible in the background.

Red Measuring Tape.description: A red flexible measuring tape used by the Young Woman to measure her waist, hips, and thighs, appearing prominently during the body measurement segment, which she uses while discussing her fitness journey.

Pink-Walled Room.description: An indoor room with pink walls, a red leather sofa, and a white wardrobe, where the Young Woman measures her body and poses for the camera while speaking about her marathon preparations.

Oven.description: A built-in white oven with a glass door, located beneath the kitchen counter, into which the Young Woman places the baking pan for cooking.

Decorative Stone Columns.description: Tall, textured columns made of stacked stone, positioned near the arched doorways, contributing to the room's architectural style, visible in the initial mirror selfie scene.

Diced Tomatoes Container.description: A clear plastic container with a green label, filled with diced tomatoes, placed on the kitchen counter and later used as a topping for the dish, explicitly identified by the Young Woman as 'Помидоры' and described as the 'второй слой' (second layer) of her preparation.

Baking Pan.description: A black rectangular baking pan used to hold the food mixture, placed on the gas stove and later inserted into the oven, containing a batter base topped with diced tomatoes and other ingredients.

Egg Bowl.description: A transparent glass bowl with a blue rim, used to mix raw chicken pieces with eggs and a liquid ingredient, placed on the kitchen counter, which the Young Woman refers to as holding the 'первый слой курицы' (first layer of chicken) for her dish.

Frozen Broccoli Bag.description: A green and white plastic bag labeled 'Broccoli' with Cyrillic text, containing frozen broccoli florets, handled by the Young Woman during grocery unpacking, accompanied by distinct crinkling sounds as she identifies its contents as 'Брокколи'.

Man in Pajamas.description: A young man, identified as 'Romka', initially seen dancing playfully with the woman in the kitchen, later eating the casserole, and interacting with the Young Woman. He speaks, asking about the food's taste, calling it 'PP' (proper nutrition), discussing the 'first day of the marathon', and revealing his nickname 'little sparrow'.

Casserole Dish.description: A golden, cheesy baked dish with diced tomatoes, identified by the Young Woman as a 'casserole bomb' and by Romka as 'PP' (proper nutrition), shown both in the oven and plated with green onions and cucumber sticks.

Elliptical Machine.description: A black Spirit brand elliptical machine with a digital display showing '0.4 KM' and 'TIME 2:18', used by the Young Woman for light cardio in the gym.

Floral Plate.description: A decorative plate with a floral design, used to serve the casserole dish, garnished with green onions and cucumber sticks.

Upbeat electronic music plays throughout the workout.

Weight Bench.description: A black adjustable weight bench with a padded surface, used by the Young Woman for dumbbell presses, featuring a backrest and leg support.

Cable Machine (Bent-Over Row).description: A black cable machine with a low pulley and straight bar, used by the Young Woman for bent-over rows, with a weight stack and adjustable height settings.

Cable Machine (Triceps Pushdown).description: A black cable machine with a high pulley and straight bar attachment, used by the Young Woman for triceps pushdowns, featuring a weight stack and cable system.

raw_segments: The video begins with a close-up of the Young Woman, now in a different setting, eating from a plate with a spoon while gesturing with her left hand, her tattoo of a rose with an arrow visible on her arm. She speaks in Russian, stating that she doesn't really like what she's eating but it's necessary, and emphasizes that breakfast is her most important meal, after which she won't eat until around 4 PM. She then transitions to a pink-walled bedroom or living area, where she faces the camera directly, speaking and gesturing expressively. She announces in Russian that she is showing her current form before the marathon, on the first day, and they will fixate on it for a 'before-after' comparison at the end of the video. She changes into a white sports bra and black underwear, pulling up striped pajama pants, and flexes her arms and back to showcase her physique. She proceeds to measure her waist, hips, and thighs with a red measuring tape, with on-screen text in Russian listing her body measurements before a fitness marathon ('ДО Марафон'), including bicep, chest, waist, hips, thigh, and height. She continues speaking, explaining that she had planned this marathon since March but only now got around to it, seeing it as an "ideal foundation" to adjust her nutrition and routine. She adds that in this video, she will eat "properly and balanced," regularly attend workouts, and on free days, include "running and stretching," hoping "everything works out." The scene shifts to a different room with a yellow wall and stone column, where she continues speaking to the camera. The video ends with a quick, shaky shot of her descending a wooden staircase, accompanied by the sound of footsteps and a final thud. Overlaid text '2 см' (2 cm) appears, which she dramatically explains in Russian, "And now I'm shocked, because I started measuring my butt, and it increased by 2 centimeters. I'm in shock."

The Young Woman, now in a white sports bra and light blue striped shorts, begins by taking a mirror selfie in a warm-toned room featuring a decorative stone column. Speaking directly to the camera in Russian, she expresses frustration about expired chicken, stating it "воняет протухшим говном" (stinks like rotten shit), and her relief at having ordered grocery delivery from Pyaterochka. She then moves to her kitchen, unpacking two white plastic bags of groceries onto a wooden floor, excitedly noting she's gathered "всяких прикольных штук" (all sorts of cool stuff) for dinner and lunch, before declaring she's "побежала готовить, а потом пойдём в зал" (ran to cook, and then we'll go to the gym). She expresses her happiness about the grocery store delivery service. As she unpacks, she identifies items aloud: "Куриная грудка" (chicken breast), "Помидоры" (tomatoes), "Огурцы" (cucumbers), and "Брокколи" (broccoli), with distinct crinkling sounds accompanying the handling of the frozen broccoli bag and another bag of "Фасоль" (beans). She also mentions "Цветная капуста" (cauliflower) and exclaims "Пиздец." Moving to a wooden kitchen counter in her light-cabinet kitchen, she prepares a dish, cracking eggs into a transparent glass bowl containing raw chicken pieces and adding a liquid. She then spreads diced tomatoes from a clear plastic container over a batter base in a black rectangular baking pan on the gas stove. Finally, from a low-angle perspective, she places the baking pan into the white oven, narrating the process: "Я уже залила первый слой курицы, второй слой помидоры, сейчас на третий слой у нас будет сыр. И отправляем в духовку." (I've already poured the first layer of chicken, second layer tomatoes, now for the third layer we'll have cheese. And we send it to the oven.) The sound of the oven door closing is heard, followed by her exclaiming "Вау!"

The segment begins with the Young Woman, dressed in a white sports bra and light blue striped shorts, placing a black baking pan filled with a golden, cheesy casserole and diced tomatoes into a white oven. A cat's meow is heard, followed by a man's voice (later identified as Romka) asking, "What came out?" The Young Woman proudly declares it a "casserole bomb!" She then removes the baked dish, showcasing its bubbly, golden-brown cheese topping, and states, "This is what we got." The scene shifts to Romka, now in a black t-shirt, eating the casserole with a fork, as the Young Woman's voice explains, "Romka is making himself creatine." Romka then asks, "Is it tastier this way?" to which the Young Woman replies, "Yes." Romka adds, "This is called PP [proper nutrition]." The casserole is then shown plated on a floral dish, garnished with green onions and accompanied by cucumber sticks. The Young Woman, now in a beige bomber jacket, is seen brushing her reddish-brown hair at a wooden vanity. Romka enters, playfully interacting with her, as text appears: 'в первый день марафона' (on the first day of the marathon). The Young Woman's voice explains their delay in going to the gym: "As always, Romka and I wanted to go to the gym around 4, 3. And everything is as always with us. We got delayed again. Now we're just heading to the gym." Romka's voice, slightly muffled, confirms, "I'm saying this is just the first day of the marathon." The Young Woman then shares a "small spoiler" about a future YouTube video where she'll be doing a "small renovation in the room." She concludes with "Okay, let's go," as upbeat electronic music begins. The setting changes to an industrial-style gym with orange accents, where the Young Woman, in a black long-sleeve top and shorts, smiles at the camera. She performs light cardio on an elliptical machine, displaying '0.4 KM' and 'TIME 2:18'. Romka's muffled voice is heard over the music, saying, "And they call me 'little sparrow'." The Young Woman then moves to barbell rows with 30 kg weights, guided by a man in a blue t-shirt, likely a Gym Instructor/Observer, amidst other people working out in the background.

The video opens in a well-lit, industrial-style gym, characterized by orange structural beams and gray corrugated ceilings, where upbeat electronic music sets an energetic tone. A Young Woman, with reddish-brown hair in a braid and dressed in a black long-sleeve top and shorts, begins her workout with barbell rows, observed by a man in a black shirt. She then transitions to a leg press machine, pushing the weight with focused effort. Pausing for a close-up, she adjusts her hair and speaks in Russian, remarking that her workout is "a bit hard" and she's "kind of messed up," explaining that today's session is "purely light" and focused on "legs, without glutes," as she trained glutes extensively last week, and it's Sunday. The electronic music resumes as she moves to a seated leg extension machine, performing controlled repetitions, followed by a close-up of her legs and the machine. She continues with triceps pushdowns on a cable machine, briefly steps onto a scale, then performs bent-over rows with another cable machine, and concludes with dumbbell presses while lying on a bench with blue-handled weights. Throughout her varied routine, the bright gym environment with its diverse equipment and distant gym-goers remains consistent.

event_blocks.summary: The scene opens in an industrial-style gym, filled with upbeat electronic music, where a Young Woman with reddish-brown hair, wearing a white sports bra and black shorts, executes a barbell row, followed by exercises on a leg press machine, a seated leg extension machine, cable rows, and dumbbell presses on a weight bench. Transitioning to a hallway, she appears in a beige jacket over a green turtleneck, carrying a backpack, and addresses the camera in Russian, describing her workout as 'sweaty' and 'tough,' particularly for her legs, admitting she felt she might 'faint' during squats but recovered. She explains her 'shitty' feeling due to not eating for '3-4 hours' and announces their return home for a 'protein casserole' and salad. The setting shifts to a kitchen, where she continues speaking Russian, mentioning the addition of 'pasta' to their meal because they were not feeling full and needed 'carbs,' and proceeds to slice 'cucumbers.' Amidst the sound of running water, she prepares a plate of fusilli pasta topped with melted cheese, diced tomatoes, and green onions, served on a bamboo placemat alongside sliced cucumbers, while a smartphone displays a TikTok video. The final shot captures her in a dimly lit room, thoughtfully touching her chin, with a timestamp of 12:06 AM visible, as she states in Russian, 'Time 12...'.

Weight Bench.description: A black adjustable weight bench with a padded surface, used by the Young Woman for dumbbell presses, featuring a backrest and leg support.

raw_segments: The minute opens in an industrial-style gym, filled with upbeat, energetic electronic music, as a Young Woman with reddish-brown hair in a braid, wearing a white sports bra and black shorts, performs a barbell row, then transitions to a leg press machine, a seated leg extension, cable rows, and dumbbell presses on a weight bench. After her workout, she appears in a hallway, now in a beige jacket over a green turtleneck with a backpack, speaking directly to the camera in Russian. She states that the workout was 'sweaty' and 'tough,' especially for her legs, and she even thought she might 'faint' while squatting, but eventually recovered. She then explains that she hasn't eaten for '3-4 hours' and is feeling 'shitty,' so they are heading home to eat a 'protein casserole' with salad. The scene shifts to a kitchen where she prepares a meal, continuing to speak in Russian, mentioning they've prepared dinner and decided to add 'pasta' because they weren't getting full and needed 'carbs,' also slicing 'cucumbers.' The sound of running water is heard as she prepares a plate of fusilli pasta topped with melted cheese, diced tomatoes, and green onions, served on a bamboo placemat with sliced cucumbers, while a smartphone displays a TikTok video. The final shot shows her in a dimly lit room, thoughtfully touching her chin, with a timestamp of 12:06 AM visible on screen, as she states in Russian, 'Time 12...'.

event_blocks.summary: The young woman, initially tired and complaining of body aches after training, decides to get up and make breakfast. She places a stainless steel pot on the gas stove as upbeat indie pop music plays. Her grocery delivery arrives, containing Royal Gala apples, oranges instead of mandarins, and bananas, which she uses to top a bowl of oatmeal. She then prepares seasoned chicken pieces, audibly sizzling in a frying pan on the gas stove without oil, as indicated by on-screen text. While the chicken cooks, she prepares a snack of a Royal Gala apple and later assembles a meal on a bamboo placemat featuring cooked chicken over rice, a bowl of salad with shrimp, cucumber, avocado, and orange segments, and buckwheat, stating she managed to cook everything.

raw_segments: The video opens with a young woman with reddish-brown hair, wearing a blue t-shirt, speaking directly to the camera in a warmly lit room adorned with decorative stone columns and yellow wall sconces. She gestures expressively as she explains in Russian, "Я ложусь спать" (I'm going to bed), having just washed but feeling "вся потная" (all sweaty) and having "вспотела за день просто нереально" (sweated unrealistically today). She describes the "кайф" (bliss) of washing after a shower and putting on clean, dry clothes. The scene then transitions to a dimly lit bedroom where she lies in bed, smiling at the camera, with a wooden headboard and patterned pillow behind her, as indistinct male voices are heard in the background, possibly from a game, before she states, "Всё, спать" (That's it, to sleep). The text 'СПИМ' (We sleep) appears on screen. She is then shown asleep, with the text 'DAY 2 09:00 AM' indicating the time. An alarm clock begins beeping loudly, signaling the start of the day. She wakes up in a pink-walled room, sitting at a table, rubbing her face and stretching, appearing tired but alert. With bright, natural morning light, she continues to speak to the camera, using hand gestures, with a red sofa and white shelves in the background. Her t-shirt has 'OPEN 650 RACE' text. She greets, "Всем доброе утро" (Good morning everyone), and emphasizes, "я еле как проснулась" (I barely woke up), a phrase also appearing as a text overlay. She explains that "болит всё тело после тренировки" (her whole body hurts after training) and she "даже вот так разогнуться не могу" (can't even straighten up like this) because it's "очень больно" (very painful). She finds it "так сложно вставать утром рано" (so hard to get up early in the morning), noting that while others rise at 4 or 5 AM, she "даже в 9 не могу встать" (can't even get up at 9), though she proudly states, "Но встала сегодня" (But I got up today), deciding not to "ложиться обратно" (go back to bed).

The video opens with a Young Woman, her reddish-brown hair tied back, sitting in a pink-walled room, appearing tired and groggy as she speaks in Russian, mentioning her resolve to complete a 'marathon' and the need to make breakfast, expressing a desire to order bananas. She lets out a long, tired 'Ooooh' (yawn) before the scene transitions to a well-lit kitchen. Upbeat, slightly melancholic indie pop music with male English vocals begins to play as she starts preparing breakfast, placing a stainless steel pot on the gas stove. On-screen text 'ГОТОВИМ ЗАВТРАК' (We are cooking breakfast) appears. The music fades as the Young Woman, now more energetic, announces in Russian that her grocery delivery has arrived while she was cooking. She unpacks clear plastic grocery bags, which rustle audibly, holding up and describing her 'favorite Royal Gala apples,' noting that oranges arrived instead of the mandarins she ordered, and finally showcasing 'three little bananas.' The segment concludes with a close-up of a white bowl of oatmeal, topped with sliced bananas and almonds, as the Young Woman declares the porridge is ready and it's time for breakfast.

The video opens with a close-up of a hand holding a white floral bowl filled with oatmeal, topped with sliced bananas and whole almonds, as a young woman with reddish-brown hair, speaking in Russian, exclaims, "So I decorated it like this, look how cool it looks right away!" and hopes it all fits, wishing everyone "enjoy your meal." She mentions someone doesn't want bananas. The scene transitions to her in a blue t-shirt with cartoon characters in a bright, yellow-walled kitchen, explaining, "I ordered delivery again," accompanied by rustling sounds, because she's "so lazy to go to the store" despite it being nearby. She gestures while speaking, then holds up a package of 'Mega' brand 'Honey Lemon' cookies and a 'Селяночка' (Selianochka) lentil bag, before mentioning "these leaves for frying" and "chicken fillet," stating, "Now we're going to make it." She contemplates cooking buckwheat, noting its crumbly state and her usual preference for sachets, hoping it turns out well. The camera then shows seasoned chicken pieces audibly sizzling in a black speckled non-stick frying pan on a white gas stove, cooking "without oil" as indicated by the on-screen Cyrillic text, all set to upbeat instrumental background music. She confirms, "Everything is working out," and plans a snack, "While it's cooking, I'll make myself a small snack in the form of an apple," specifying a "Royal Gala pop." The young woman is later seen holding a small yellow container, likely a spice, before proudly presenting a final meal on a bamboo placemat: a white floral plate of cooked chicken over rice, alongside a matching bowl of salad with shrimp, diced cucumber, avocado, and orange segments. She states, "I managed to cook buckwheat, I managed to cook everything, make myself, I made a salad with sour cream, tomatoes, cucumber," before the video concludes with a top-down view of the appealing meal.

event_blocks.summary: The narrative begins with a close-up of a meal featuring grilled chicken and rice with salad on a bamboo placemat, expanding to show more dishes and a smartphone displaying a TikTok video, while a Young Woman explains in Russian her meal preparation choices due to "him" disliking certain ingredients, followed by a male voice's query. After a black screen with 'спустя час' (one hour later), the Young Woman is seen napping on a Beige Leather Sectional Sofa under a pink blanket, with a male voice narrating her sleep schedule and questioning her wakefulness. As she stirs, groggily confirming 'сил нет' (no strength) aloud and sitting up, she moves to a pink-walled room with a red leather sofa, wearing a blue t-shirt with cartoon cats and paw prints, and displaying a tattoo on her left arm. She explains to the camera in Russian that the weather, lack of sun, and feeling 'knocked out hard' caused her to sleep, contrasting it with her usual energy drink and chocolate consumption, and noting her body is 'in shock' from daily eating habits. She declares the 'hot, stuffy' weather makes her feel 'shitty' and 'impossible,' resolving to 'go run' and do 'a little cardio, plus stretching.' The scene then shifts to a pink-walled room where the Young Woman, in a light blue t-shirt, energetically discusses her home gym and her fondness for ordering sportswear from AliExpress. Transitioning to a teal-walled Gym Environment, she performs warm-ups like arm circles and side bends before running on a Treadmill, her reflection visible in a Mirror, exclaiming 'I'm all sweaty.' The on-screen text 'МИНИ-ТРЕНИРОВКА доча' (Mini-Workout, daughter) appears. She then moves to floor exercises on a Yoga Mat, including sit-ups and stretching, with a Standing Fan and a Wooden Door in the background. The video concludes with her in the gym, breathing heavily, revealing she ran almost 2 kilometers barefoot.

raw_segments: The segment opens with a close-up of a plated meal featuring grilled chicken over rice and a colorful salad, set on a bamboo placemat. The camera pans out to reveal two more plates, one with creamy shrimp and avocado salad, all on a patterned tablecloth, as a hand adjusts a fork near a smartphone displaying a TikTok video. A Young Woman's voice explains in Russian that she prepared the meal this way because "he" doesn't like sour cream or such salads, to which a male voice asks "Why? I just don't like sour cream." The Young Woman then comments on the meal's appetizing look, stating they are hungry and about to eat. A black screen with the text 'спустя час' (one hour later) appears with a sound effect, transitioning to the Young Woman lying on a Beige Leather Sectional Sofa, covered by a pink blanket, seemingly napping. The male voice narrates, observing how their "marathon" (likely referring to proper nutrition) is going, noting that "a person can't wake up at 9 AM" and that it's "about 4 PM now" after she "ate and just went to sleep." He then asks her, "Why are you sleeping?" As she slowly wakes, stretching and reaching for her phone, the text 'сил нет' (no strength) appears on screen, which she groggily confirms aloud. She sits up, looking tired, then shifts to a pink-walled room with a red leather sofa, speaking directly to the camera with expressive gestures. Wearing a blue t-shirt with cartoon cats and paw prints, and displaying a tattoo on her left arm, she explains in Russian that she "fell asleep" due to the weather, lack of sun, and feeling "knocked out hard" with "little strength." She elaborates that she usually drinks energy drinks and eats chocolate when tired, but is currently lacking it, feeling her "body is a bit in shock" as she "eats this every day." She adds that the "hot, stuffy" weather makes her feel "shitty," concluding that it's "impossible" and she will "go run" and do "a little cardio, plus stretching."

The video begins in a pink-walled room where a Young Woman, wearing a light blue t-shirt adorned with cartoon characters including a blue cat and paw prints, speaks directly to the camera. Despite appearing tired, she speaks energetically in Russian, explaining, "Moreover, I have a gym at home. It's a sin not to work out, so to speak." She further elaborates on ordering "a million, f*cking awesome, beautiful, sports suits from AliExpress," stating, "I really like it. I just adore, like, different suits," and noting that her dresser is full of sportswear. A calm, melancholic plucked string instrument melody plays as the scene transitions to her standing in the same room, now wearing a black halter sports bra and black shorts, gesturing expressively. The setting then shifts to a teal-walled gym, where the on-screen text 'МИНИ-ТРЕНИРОВКА доча' (Mini-Workout, daughter) appears. She warms up with arm circles and side bends before running on a treadmill, her reflection visible in a large mirror, accompanied by the distinct sound of her running. During this, she exclaims, "I'm all sweaty." The music briefly returns before she transitions to floor exercises on a beige yoga mat, performing sit-ups and stretching, with a standing fan and a wooden door visible in the background. The video concludes with her looking directly at the camera, breathing heavily in the gym environment, and stating, "Attention, just how wet I am," before revealing, "I ran almost 2 kilometers. I ran barefoot, by the way."

event_blocks.summary: The Young Woman instructs in Russian to mold and fry pancakes without oil, as they are cooked in a black frying pan and then presented in a glass bowl on a dining table alongside a yellow bowl of fruit, a rolling pin, and a teacup; she, wearing a black t-shirt and polka-dot skirt, sips from a mug while a Male Speaker, in a black t-shirt and pajama pants, sits at the table, commenting on the flour-dusted pancakes. Transitioning to an outdoor rural landscape with power lines and a dirt road, the Young Woman announces a spontaneous trip to Yekaterinburg with Masha. Inside a moving vehicle, she, now in an orange top, explains the challenge of not eating during the day due to the trip. A close-up reveals a pre-packaged meal of grilled chicken breast with sauerkraut, followed by her describing her food: chicken, stewed cabbage, vegetable salad, and tangerines and kiwi, which she eats at a wooden table with iced tea and a cherry-mint mors drink, using a black fork. Later, walking on a city sidewalk with a friend holding an orange juice bottle, amidst bare trees and classical buildings, she states they ate at Zhizn Mart and are almost full.

raw_segments: The video opens with a close-up of golden-brown, freshly cooked pancakes in a glass bowl, transitioning to a black frying pan where more pancakes are being cooked on a stovetop, as the Young Woman's voice gives instructions in Russian to "put them on a board and mold the pancakes and fry them without oil, that's the main thing," accompanied by background music. The scene shifts to a dining table covered with a lace tablecloth, where the pancakes are now piled in the glass bowl, accompanied by a yellow bowl of oranges and peaches, a wooden rolling pin, and a small teacup. The Young Woman, in a black t-shirt and white polka-dot skirt, stands sipping from a mug, while a Male Speaker in a black t-shirt and plaid pajama pants sits at the table, looking toward the camera. The Young Woman comments, "That's it, we've made the pancakes. Look how beautiful it looks, really," to which the Male Speaker responds, "So beautiful in flour," and she confirms, "Yes, it's all in flour, but that's okay." The setting then changes to an outdoor rural landscape under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds, featuring power lines and a dirt road, as the Young Woman narrates, "Well, and then Masha and I spontaneously decided to go to Yekaterinburg for a walk." The next scene shows the Young Woman with reddish-brown hair, wearing an orange top, speaking directly to the camera from inside a moving vehicle, with a blue curtain and passing scenery visible behind her, explaining, "Today is a special day for me. I have an obstacle in the form of the fact that I'm going to Yekaterinburg and I'll have to restrain myself and not eat during the day, but..." The video then cuts to a close-up of a pre-packaged meal: grilled chicken breast with sauerkraut, labeled in Russian with nutritional information (282.6 kcal, 120/150g net weight). The Young Woman describes it as "the optimal option... my food: chicken, stewed cabbage, vegetable salad, a fruit cup... just tangerines and kiwi, and this cherry-mint mors." She is shown eating the meal at a wooden table, with a glass of iced tea containing kiwi and orange slices, and a bottle labeled 'Жизнь Март Морс Вишня-Мята' (Life Mart Mors Cherry-Mint), using a black fork. The scene then shifts to her walking outdoors on a city sidewalk, speaking to the camera, with another woman (her friend) in a black coat walking beside her, holding an orange juice bottle. The outdoor setting features bare trees, a paved path, and classical-style buildings with ornate railings, as the Young Woman concludes, "We ate at Zhizn Mart, I'm almost full. In principle, I'm already halfway..."

event_blocks.summary: A young woman embarks on a personal challenge to avoid buying snacks, initially documenting her journey outdoors near a classical building and later in a moving vehicle, recounting a friend's suggestion to eat a tortilla which she resisted. She shares her pre-packaged meal of buckwheat with a chicken cutlet on a wooden table, quickly consuming it. Later, she is seen with a friend on an urban sidewalk, discussing their tiredness and the success of her challenge, before showing a smartphone with a language learning app. The narrative shifts to a nighttime cityscape, where she continues her Russian commentary about heading home, the day's success, and a 'difficult challenge' she overcame, passing landmarks like a brightly lit church. A brief interlude features another woman smiling near an illuminated star. The young woman then humorously describes her run and her friend's support for her 'marathon.' The scene transitions to a dark car interior, then to a tiled bathroom where, on 'DAY 5 09:02 AM,' she discusses improvising with apples for her syrniki due to a lack of honey, and notes her stomach has become smaller. Outdoors, carrying groceries with a young man, she heads to the gym, detailing her planned glute workout and a recent mini-record on a glute bridge. Finally, in a gym with orange and gray lockers, she expresses surprise at the workout's ease despite her lower back starting to hurt. The next day, she happily notes the gym is empty, allowing her to use equipment freely. After a dynamic warm-up with hip-hop music, she performs weighted hip thrusts, increasing the barbell weight to 75 kg, and then moves to a cable machine for bent-over rows in a well-lit gym environment.

She later appears in a white zip-up jacket and then a white long-sleeve top and red shorts, performing dynamic warm-ups, weighted hip thrusts (with weights increasing from 45 kg to 75 kg), and bent-over rows on a cable machine, demonstrating strength and focus, while also stating 'In the hall, there's really no one' and 'Let's start' in Russian.

The video opens with a close-up of a smartphone screen displaying a language learning app with Spanish phrases, while upbeat Latin music featuring a male vocalist singing 'Me gusta la cena, me gustas tú' plays. The scene transitions to a serene nighttime cityscape before following a young woman with reddish-brown hair in an orange ribbed top, walking through a city street with a friend. She speaks directly to the camera in Russian, stating they are 'just heading home' and are 'already tired,' despite the day having 'gone great' and being a 'difficult challenge,' emphasizing that 'the most important thing is that I succeeded.' Upbeat Latin music continues in the background as they pass a McDonald’s and a brightly lit church with golden domes, and she adjusts her microphone. The scene briefly cuts to a different woman with dark hair and glasses smiling in a well-lit urban setting with a large illuminated star, then returns to the young woman who briefly mentions 'And here we have cardio' in Russian. The video returns to the language learning app on the smartphone, where the Latin music's male vocalist sings 'I don't know what I'm going to do, I am lost.' The young woman continues her Russian commentary, describing something 'interesting' and 'fucked up,' then declares 'Loafers are the best.' Her friend, identified by her voice, asks 'Masha, how was your run?', to which the young woman (Masha) humorously replies, 'The sky is prickly.' The friend then adds, 'We support Alyonka's marathon,' all against the backdrop of the continuing Latin music. The video briefly returns to the smartphone app, where the Latin music's male vocalist sings 'I like the feat, I like you.' The scene then shifts to a dark car interior with a smartphone displaying a music app, as the Latin music fades out and is replaced by the distinct sound of a car engine running. The final scene shows the young woman, now in a white floral tank top, stretching in a tiled bathroom with a white water heater, with on-screen text marking 'DAY 5 09:02 AM,' as a quiet, ambient hum concludes the segment.

The segment begins on 'DAY 5 09:02 AM' with a view through a window of a bright, sunny day. Gentle, melodic string music plays as the Young Woman, in a white tank top, speaks directly to the camera in Russian, explaining that she had no honey for her syrniki (cottage cheese pancakes) and had to improvise with apples. She then appears seated at a table, eating pancakes topped with diced apples and drinking from a white mug with Cyrillic text reading 'КРУЖКА УТРЕННЕЙ МОТИВАЦИИ' (Mug of Morning Motivation), which she points out, noting her tea is without sugar. The scene shifts to a pink-walled room where she adjusts her beige high-waisted underwear, revealing a small tattoo on her left arm, while commenting that her stomach has become much smaller, almost flat. The music fades as she is next seen outdoors, walking with a young man in a white t-shirt and backpack, both carrying groceries, as she holds the camera in a selfie-style shot. She explains they are going to the gym, noting her face is puffy and she doesn't know why. She then details her workout plans, stating today's session is for glutes and will be a tough one, mentioning she recently did a mini-record of 75kg on a glute bridge. The final scene shows her in a gym with orange and gray lockers, wearing a red top and holding a white towel, making expressive hand gestures as she continues to speak, expressing surprise that the workout felt easier than expected, though her lower back started hurting. She concludes by hoping the workout goes well.

The video opens with a Young Woman, with long reddish-brown hair and wearing a white tank top, speaking directly to the camera in Russian from a gym environment, standing before a wall of orange and gray lockers. She expresses her happiness about the gym being empty, stating that she met someone's mom in the changing room who mentioned it was very crowded before, but now there's nobody, allowing her to use any equipment without waiting. As she transitions to walking through a gym corridor in a white zip-up jacket, holding a white towel, an upbeat, whimsical instrumental tune begins to play. She reiterates in Russian that "In the hall, there's really no one," before declaring "Let's start." The scene then shifts to her performing a dynamic warm-up with arm swings and leg movements in a white long-sleeve top and red shorts, as the music changes to an energetic hip-hop/trap beat featuring a repetitive vocal sample. She proceeds to execute weighted hip thrusts on a black weight bench, progressively increasing the barbell weight from 45 kg to 75 kg, as indicated by on-screen text. After completing her set, she stands up, adjusts her clothing, and moves to a cable machine to perform bent-over rows, gripping the handle with one hand while supporting herself with the other. The well-lit gym, with its exposed ductwork, orange structural beams, and various equipment like dumbbells and kettlebells, maintains an active and focused atmosphere, underscored by the continuous energetic music.

event_blocks.summary: In a gym environment with orange and gray lockers, a Young Woman with reddish-brown hair and a tattoo on her left arm, wearing a white tank top and red shorts, addresses the camera in Russian, exclaiming, "Girls, the workout is bomb!" As upbeat electronic music with a strong beat commences, she performs weighted hip thrusts on a black weight bench, increasing the barbell weight from 45 kg to 75 kg, before moving to a cable machine for bent-over rows in the brightly lit gym featuring exposed ductwork and orange structural beams, with other gym-goers in the background. Afterward, visibly sweaty, she speaks to the camera in a close-up shot against the lockers, saying "Workout, daughter," and then explains in Russian her desire for a buffet that was too crowded, her inability to go home due to an upcoming eyebrow and eyelash appointment with "Pani Tikpolis" and "Anya," and her need to eat despite expecting to be late. The scene transitions to her pre-packaged meal, a clear container with a salad of red and orange bell peppers, onions, and meat, accompanied by a tray of oatmeal, which she consumes with a fork, remarking, "I just ate super awesomely." Later, clad in a white zip-up jacket and holding a towel, she walks through a hallway adorned with graffiti-covered walls, then proceeds outdoors into a residential area with trees and parked cars, now in a white long-sleeve top and carrying a black backpack. Amidst traffic noise and a car passing, she walks along a sidewalk, confirming to the camera, "I came to Anya for eyebrows and eyelashes," and later, "That's it, I went for my eyebrows. The mood is bomb, but..."

event_blocks.summary: On a sunny city sidewalk, a young woman wearing a white long-sleeve top and black backpack, holding a plastic bag with tomatoes, speaks to the camera in Russian, shielding her eyes from the sun and expressing severe discomfort, stating she feels like she's "going to die from pain" and needs to go home to eat, while wistfully mentioning a desire for cheesecake and coffee she cannot have. Passing a storefront with a 'MOMENT' sign, she recounts purchasing the tomatoes for 400 rubles, deeming the weather "lovely." The scene transitions to a teal-walled interior where she holds a blue towel, complaining about leg pain and the difficulty of climbing stairs. Later, seated on a wooden park bench in a black jacket, she explains that videos were being filmed for white sneakers with velcro straps, which are then shown on a dirt path from various angles, noting her classmates are opening a sneaker shop and the shoes became dirty during filming. She then expresses an urgent need for dinner, as it is 7 PM, leading to a close-up of her plated meal at 07:40 PM: breaded chicken pieces over spiral pasta with cherry tomatoes, which she describes as her dinner prepared by "Roma," consisting of fried chicken breast and pasta.

event_blocks.summary: In a pink-walled room, the Young Woman, sporting a black floral tattoo on her left arm and wearing a white tank top, addresses the camera in Russian, detailing her demanding day filled with filming and training, her persistent hunger, and late-night editing. Despite feeling tired and mentioning her menstrual cycle, she expresses feeling significantly better, viewing a marathon as an "ideal start" to establish a routine for diet and training. The scene transitions with the sound of a squeaky toy and upbeat hip-hop music, cutting to a dimly lit bedroom where the Young Man in a black long-sleeve shirt, under a patterned blanket, raises his hand. The Young Woman, now in a blue t-shirt, lies beside him, looking up with a surprised or tired expression, softly bidding "Good night" and then "And again, good morning." Finally, she is seen sitting up in a yellow-walled room, drinking from a large plastic water bottle labeled 'ПОТРОН', with audible gulping sounds and a focused, slightly strained expression.

raw_segments: The video opens with the Young Woman in a pink-walled room, wearing a white tank top, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures and wide eyes, her left arm displaying a black floral tattoo. She speaks in Russian, urgently explaining her busy day, her hunger despite not eating since dinner, and her late-night editing work. She reflects on a tough day involving filming and training, feeling tired, and mentions menstrual periods, but expresses that she now feels much better with a marathon, calling it an “ideal start” to train, follow a diet, and maintain a routine to ensure everything progresses positively. Following her monologue, the atmosphere shifts with the sound of a squeaky toy and then upbeat hip-hop music featuring a male vocalist. The scene then cuts to a dimly lit bedroom where a young man lies in bed, wearing a black long-sleeve shirt, partially covered by a patterned blanket, raising his hand as if to stop or signal. The camera then shifts to the Young Woman lying beside him, now in a blue t-shirt, looking up with a surprised or tired expression, as her voice softly says “Спокойной ночи” (Good night) and then “И снова доброе утро” (And again, good morning). The final scene shows her sitting up in a different room with yellow walls, holding a large plastic water bottle labeled 'ПОТРОН', tilting it as distinct gulping and drinking sounds are heard, her expression focused and slightly strained.

event_blocks.summary: A young woman with reddish-brown hair, dressed in a blue t-shirt and striped pajama pants, begins by speaking to the camera in Russian from a spacious, warmly lit room with a high ceiling and visible staircase, lamenting the difficulty of waking up and proposing to make breakfast. The scene shifts to a kitchen at 09:16 AM, underscored by upbeat, melancholic acoustic guitar music, where she pours milk from a pink and white bottle into a white ceramic bowl, stirs it, and chops cherry tomatoes on a wooden cutting board with a white-handled knife. She then presents a white plate with a floral rim, featuring scrambled eggs topped with tomatoes and dill, alongside avocado toast, explaining in Russian that the avocado had finally softened and was mashed into a puree with lemon juice. At a dining table with bamboo placemats, she and a partially visible man eat while using their smartphones, with the acoustic music continuing softly. Later, in a different room, wearing a white tank top and holding a dark brown wooden hairbrush, she speaks to the camera against a backdrop of decorative stone columns and a wooden staircase. She shares in Russian that while she intended for the day to be like a day off, tasks have accumulated, and despite the summery, warm weather, it's too hot to go for a walk, humorously fearing she might faint. The video concludes with a close-up of her face as she speaks, followed by a view through a window of a bright, green, tree-filled outdoor area.

raw_segments: The video opens with a low-angle shot of the Young Woman, with reddish-brown hair, sitting on the floor in a spacious, warmly lit home with a high ceiling and visible staircase, wearing a blue t-shirt and light blue striped pajama pants. She speaks directly to the camera in Russian, lamenting how difficult it was to wake up at 9 AM without a marathon, stating, "It's very hard, very." She then playfully suggests, "Well, let's go make breakfast?" The scene transitions to her preparing breakfast in the kitchen at 09:16 AM, accompanied by upbeat, slightly melancholic acoustic guitar music. She pours milk from a pink and white plastic bottle into a white ceramic bowl, stirs it, and then chops bright red cherry tomatoes on a wooden cutting board with a white-handled knife. She then presents a decorative white plate with a floral rim, holding scrambled eggs topped with tomatoes and fresh green dill, accompanied by two slices of avocado toast. She explains in Russian that the avocado "finally became soft" and she "mashed it into a puree," adding "a little lemon juice." The breakfast is served at a dining table with bamboo placemats, where she and a partially visible man eat while using their smartphones, with the acoustic guitar music continuing softly. The Young Woman then appears in a different room, wearing a white tank top, holding a dark brown wooden hairbrush, and speaking to the camera against a background of a stone column and a wooden staircase. She shares in Russian that she "wanted to make it like a day off," but "as always, a lot of things pile up." She then describes the weather as "so summery, so warm," making her want to go for a walk, but it's "so hot that I think I'll go out and faint," jokingly asking to be caught. The video ends with a close-up of her face as she speaks, followed by a shot of a window overlooking a bright, green, tree-filled outdoor area.

event_blocks.summary: In a modern kitchen, the Young Woman, speaking Russian, explains her YouTube viewing habits while cooking, showing her laptop displaying a video. She announces her intention to boil pasta, and the scene shifts to a pot of boiling water with broccoli and cauliflower, into which she adds seasoning and other ingredients, describing her meal of broccoli, cauliflower, tomato, fillet, and pasta. A beautifully plated dish of seasoned chicken over spiral pasta with steamed vegetables is then shown. Transitioning to a different room with a stone column, she expresses extreme hunger, lamenting they haven't eaten for three and a half hours, while a male voice suggests eating every four hours. She then presents a 'Фруктовый ЛАВАШ' packet, prompting the male voice to joyfully exclaim about the 'yummy treat' and its plum flavor. Later, in a yellow-walled room, she introduces the 'fruit lavash' for tasting, rating it 7.5/10, while the male voice finds it more sour, rating it 5/10. She then shows a brown paper bag containing 'Peeled hazelnuts from Azerbaijan' with 'honey,' mentioning a trip to an eco-products store. After trying the hazelnuts, she moves to a pink-walled room, discussing her gym routine and an upcoming rest day. In a kitchen setting, with the text 'БАВАРСКИЙ САЛАТ' displayed, she begins preparing her favorite Bavarian salad without mayonnaise or oil, chopping raw chicken on a wooden cutting board and listing tomatoes, cheese, and croutons as ingredients, with sour cream, mustard, and soy sauce for the sauce. The sizzling chicken is shown, and she announces a delivery of sour cream for the salad and bananas. She proudly presents the finished Bavarian salad with croutons, diced tomatoes, and herbs, detailing how she made the croutons herself. While eating the salad at a dining table, a male voice is heard in the background, followed by a phone ringing and her reflection on needing to run and stretch. The scene shifts to a teal-walled room with a treadmill and punching bag, where she stretches, preparing for her fitness routine. In this room, she begins running on the treadmill, her exertion visible in a mirror, accompanied by upbeat electronic music. Becoming visibly sweaty, she expresses extreme exhaustion, noting it's dripping off her and that she's never run like this before but enjoyed it, attributing her energy to 'фонк' music. She then demonstrates leg flexibility and delivers a motivational message about internal motivation, encouraging likes. The segment concludes with her standing confidently, exhausted but satisfied, as the music fades back in.

She is visibly sweaty, with a focused expression, and interacts with the camera by speaking in Russian, expressing a range of emotions from extreme exhaustion ("Ёбнешься," "Это пиздец," "Я просто вся мокрая," "Я вся потная") and amazement ("Я просто в шоке") to pride in her effort ("Я никогда так не бегала, ребят," "с удовольствием побегала," "вообще молодец"). She also offers motivational advice ("пока у тебя изнутри самого мотивация не появится что-то делать, ты не сделаешь"), identifies the background music as 'фонк', and makes a call to action for likes. She holds a smartphone to film herself and performs a leg stretch, showcasing her fitness routine.

Blue Resistance Band Rack.description: A rack with blue resistance bands, located near the wooden door, visible during the stretching segment.

raw_segments: The video opens with a wide shot of a modern kitchen, featuring cream and wood cabinetry, a black backsplash, and various appliances. The Young Woman, speaking in Russian, explains that she always turns on YouTube when cooking, and today she's watching "Karambuba." A close-up shows her laptop on the dark kitchen counter displaying a video of a woman in a white robe, confirming her statement. She then announces her intention to boil pasta. The scene transitions to a pot of boiling water with broccoli and cauliflower, followed by a close-up of a hand pouring a red packet of seasoning into the pot. The Young Woman, now in a white tank top, adds ingredients to the pot, while gentle, melancholic instrumental music plays in the background. She describes the "yummy thing" she's making: broccoli, cauliflower, a tomato, fillet, and pasta. The video then cuts to a beautifully plated meal—seasoned chicken over spiral pasta, accompanied by steamed broccoli, cauliflower, and a cherry tomato—arranged on a dark glass plate atop a bamboo placemat, with the time stamp '02:26 PM' on screen. The Young Woman, now in a different room with a stone column and wooden furniture, speaks directly to the camera with an animated expression, lamenting in Russian that they haven't eaten for three and a half hours and are "just going to die of hunger." A male voice interjects, suggesting one should eat every four hours. The Young Woman then holds up a yellow and purple packet labeled 'Фруктовый ЛАВАШ' (Fruit Lavash), speaking the Russian text overlay 'ну иди смотри вдруг тебе что-то понравится' (well, go look, maybe you'll like something). A close-up shows a hand holding a wooden hairbrush before returning to the Young Woman, now wearing a pearl necklace, holding the same packet with a thoughtful expression against a background of a wooden cabinet and yellow wall. She repeats "Фруктовый лаваш," prompting the male voice to burst into loud, joyful laughter, exclaiming that he brought a "yummy treat." He then adds that it's "vitamins all year round, plum-flavored."

The segment opens in a warmly lit, yellow-walled room where the Young Woman, with a clear and expressive voice, holds up a yellow and purple 'Фруктовый ЛАВАШ' packet, introducing it as 'fruit lavash' for tasting. A male voice speculates on its plum flavor and asks about its purchase, followed by rustling sounds as they discuss the two pieces inside. The Young Woman finds the lavash sweet and suitable for a snack, rating it 7.5 out of 10, while the male voice perceives it as more sour, giving it a 5 out of 10. She then displays a brown paper bag with a price tag, identifying its contents as 'Peeled hazelnuts from Azerbaijan' and mentioning 'honey,' with the male voice noting that 'Roma just went to the eco-products store.' The Young Woman tries the hazelnuts, stating it's her first time, and chewing sounds are heard as the male voice comments on the delayed taste. The scene shifts to a pink-walled room where the Young Woman animatedly describes bringing the hazelnuts to her room to eat, before mentioning that a marathon is ending tomorrow and they will have a rest day from the gym. Finally, in a kitchen setting, with on-screen text 'БАВАРСКИЙ САЛАТ,' she begins chopping raw chicken on a wooden cutting board, announcing she is making her 'favorite Bavarian salad without mayonnaise, without oil,' and listing chicken as a necessary ingredient.

The video opens with a top-down view of a kitchen where a Young Woman, with reddish-brown hair and wearing a white tank top and pearl necklace, is chopping raw chicken on a wooden cutting board, transferring pieces into a black non-stick frying pan on a white gas stove. A text overlay 'БАВАРСКИЙ САЛАТ' (Bavarian Salad) appears as the Young Woman's voice, speaking Russian, lists ingredients: "помидоры, сыр, и сухарики" (tomatoes, cheese, and croutons). She continues, "Для соуса нам понадобится сметана, горчица и соевый соус. Всё, это бомба." (For the sauce we need sour cream, mustard, and soy sauce. That's it, this is a bomb!). The scene transitions to a close-up of the chicken sizzling in the pan, accompanied by a distinct sizzling sound. Next, the Young Woman is seen in a yellow-walled room with a decorative stone column, holding a white container with a blue lid, explaining, "Пока я тут готовлю, мне пришла доставочка снова. Я заказала сметану на салат, для соуса надо, и бананы." (While I'm cooking here, a delivery arrived again. I ordered sour cream for the salad, for the sauce, and bananas.). The next shot proudly presents a large bowl of Bavarian salad, topped with golden croutons, diced tomatoes, and herbs, as she announces, "Всё, я приготовила свой любимый салат, баварский. он вообще очень быстро у меня приготовился. Вообще класс." (That's it, I've prepared my favorite salad, Bavarian. it actually cooked very quickly for me. Totally cool.). She further details, "сделала сама в духовке сухарики, посыпала их там солью, перцем, всякими спицами, ну обычными. И всё." (I made the croutons myself in the oven, sprinkled them with salt, pepper, all sorts of spices, well, ordinary ones. And that's it.). She then sits at a dining table with a patterned tablecloth, eating the salad with a fork, while a smartphone with a cat-themed screen is visible nearby. A male voice is heard in the background, possibly from a TV or radio, saying "извинения за то, что избил беззащит" (apologies for beating up defenseless...). A phone ringing sound is heard, followed by the Young Woman's voice reflecting, "Просто сейчас лежала целых полтора часа, наверное. Просто нихуя не делала. И только сейчас вспомнила, что у нас бег, растяжка. Так что я бегу всё делать." (I just lay there for a whole hour and a half, probably. Just didn't do anything. And only now I remembered that we have running, stretching. So I'm going to do everything.). The time overlay '10:36 PM' appears as she continues eating. The final scene shifts to a teal-walled room with a treadmill and a punching bag, where she is seen stretching her leg, wearing white socks and sneakers, with a Tefal product box in the background, all set to an upbeat, electronic background music, signaling a transition to her fitness routine.

The video opens with a young woman, her reddish-brown hair in a ponytail, crouching excitedly beside a treadmill in a teal-walled room, as the on-screen text 'ЛЕТСОГОООООООУ' signals the start of her workout. She begins running on the black treadmill, her reflection visible in a large mirror, while upbeat electronic workout music with a driving beat plays in the background. The room's details, including an American flag-decorated punching bag, a white standing fan, and a Tefal product box, are visible. As she runs, she becomes visibly sweaty, with close-ups capturing her exertion and focus. Pausing, her face glistening with sweat, she speaks directly to the camera in Russian, exclaiming, "Ёбнешься," and "Это пиздец," conveying her extreme exhaustion. She describes herself as "вся мокрая" (all wet) and "потная" (sweaty), noting, "с меня просто течёт" (it's just dripping off me), as the text 'КАРДИО 3 КМ БЕГ' appears. She then proudly states she "никогда так не бегала, ребят" (never ran like this) but did so "с удовольствием" (with pleasure), attributing her energy to the "фонк" music she put on. Holding up her smartphone to film herself, she transitions to a full-body shot, stretching her leg to demonstrate flexibility, with a wooden door with glass panels and a blue resistance band rack in the background. She delivers a motivational message in Russian, emphasizing that "пока у тебя изнутри самого мотивация не появится что-то делать, ты не сделаешь" (until motivation appears from within you to do something, you won't do it), and encourages viewers to like the video. The segment concludes with her standing confidently, hands on hips, letting out an exhausted sigh, and declaring, "Я просто в шоке" (I'm just in shock), as the electronic music fades back in.

event_blocks.summary: In a teal-walled room, a Young Woman with reddish-brown hair and a tattoo on her left arm completes a dynamic stretching routine on a green yoga mat, transitioning through various poses including a deep forward bend, a full split, a bridge pose, and a backbend, with a wooden door and a blue resistance band rack in the background. She then films herself with a smartphone, announcing in Russian the end of her workout marathon and expressing shock and satisfaction at her accomplishment. The scene shifts to a dimly lit bedroom where she lies in bed, joined by a Young Man with short dark hair; an on-screen text overlay reads 'DAY 7 10:04 AM'. The Young Man asks if she's happy about having another day off with no alarm, to which she agrees, but a sudden alarm clock beep is heard. The narrative then moves to a yellow-walled room with a stone column, where the Young Woman, now in a blue t-shirt, begins a new day's routine with arm stretches to melancholic piano music. She greets her audience, stating she slept until ten and plans to make porridge and go out to avoid staying home. Sunlight streams through a large window as she prepares porridge on a white gas stove, stirring rolled oats in a stainless steel pot. After pouring water from a large plastic bottle into a white mug, she responds to a male voice and eats oatmeal from a floral-rimmed plate, noting the half-hour cooking time. Later, she presents a bowl of Bavarian salad with croutons, tomatoes, and herbs for lunch, mentioning a desire for something 'normal' and planning a walk in the residential area due to ticks. The video concludes with her and the man walking outdoors in a residential area carrying groceries under an overcast sky, followed by a shot of her walking a black and tan dog on a leash through a grassy field, with a timestamp of '05:49 PM' and faint orchestral music playing.

She expresses feeling great after sleeping in, mentions making porridge, and later discusses having breakfast and lunch (with a male companion), and plans for a walk, noting the presence of ticks in the forest. Her voice is clear and expressive, sometimes with a hint of frustration.
